mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT NVL(SUM(PAY_AMT), 0) FROM TUITION_PAYMENT WHERE TRIM(PAY_STAT_CD) = '01' AND TRUNC(PAY_DT) = TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS TODAY_AMT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TUITION_PAYMENT WHERE TRIM(PAY_STAT_CD) = '01' AND TRUNC(PAY_DT) = TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS TODAY_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT USER_ID) FROM TUITION_BILL WHERE TRIM(BILL_STAT_CD) IN ('01', '02')) AS UNPAID_CNT, (SELECT NVL(SUM(BILL_AMT), 0) FROM TUITION_BILL WHERE TRIM(BILL_STAT_CD) IN ('01', '02')) AS UNPAID_TOTAL_AMT, (SELECT NVL(SUM(PAY_AMT), 0) FROM TUITION_PAYMENT WHERE TRIM(PAY_STAT_CD) = '01' AND TRIM(PAY_MTHD_CD) = '01' AND TRUNC(PAY_DT) = TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS CARD_AMT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TUITION_PAYMENT WHERE TRIM(PAY_STAT_CD) = '01' AND TRIM(PAY_MTHD_CD) = '01' AND TRUNC(PAY_DT) = TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS CARD_CARD_CNT, (SELECT NVL(SUM(PAY_AMT), 0) FROM TUITION_PAYMENT WHERE TRIM(PAY_STAT_CD) = '01' AND TRIM(PAY_MTHD_CD) IN ('02', '03') AND TRUNC(PAY_DT) = TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS TRANSFER_AMT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TUITION_PAYMENT WHERE TRIM(PAY_STAT_CD) = '01' AND TRIM(PAY_MTHD_CD) IN ('02', '03') AND TRUNC(PAY_DT) = TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS TRANSFER_CNT FROM DUAL
mapper.sql: P.PAY_SN, P.USER_ID, M.USER_NAME AS STUDENT_NM, P.EXT_PAY_ID, P.PAY_ITEM_CD, CI.COM_CD_NM AS PAY_ITEM_NM, P.PAY_AMT, P.PAY_MTHD_CD, CM.COM_CD_NM AS PAY_MTHD_NM, P.CARD_NM, P.INSTALLMENT_MM, P.PAY_STAT_CD, CS.COM_CD_NM AS PAY_STAT_NM, P.PAY_DT

FROM TUITION_PAYMENT P JOIN MEMBER M ON P.USER_ID = M.USER_ID AND M.USER_ROLE = 'ROLE_STUDENT' LEFT JOIN COM_CD CI ON TRIM(CI.CL_CODE) = '222' AND TRIM(CI.COM_CD) = TRIM(P.PAY_ITEM_CD) LEFT JOIN COM_CD CM ON TRIM(CM.CL_CODE) = '223' AND TRIM(CM.COM_CD) = TRIM(P.PAY_MTHD_CD) LEFT JOIN COM_CD CS ON TRIM(CS.CL_CODE) = '225' AND TRIM(CS.COM_CD) = TRIM(P.PAY_STAT_CD)
mapper.select:
SELECT
ORDER BY P.PAY_DT DESC, P.PAY_SN DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{screenSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TUITION_PAYMENT P JOIN MEMBER M ON P.USER_ID = M.USER_ID AND M.USER_ROLE = 'ROLE_STUDENT'

where.if: AND (UPPER(M.USER_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{detailCondition.keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(P.EXT_PAY_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{detailCondition.keyword}) || '%')

mapper.select:
SELECT
ORDER BY P.PAY_DT DESC, P.PAY_SN DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{screenSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TUITION_PAYMENT P JOIN MEMBER M ON P.USER_ID = M.USER_ID AND M.USER_ROLE = 'ROLE_STUDENT'
mapper.sql:
WHERE TRIM(B.BILL_STAT_CD) IN ('01', '02') AND M.USER_ROLE = 'ROLE_STUDENT'
AND UPPER(M.USER_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{detailCondition.keyword}) || '%'
mapper.select:
SELECT B.USER_ID, M.USER_NAME AS STUDENT_NM, NULL AS PARENT_NM, NULL AS PARENT_TEL, SUM(B.BILL_AMT) AS UNPAID_AMT, COUNT(*) AS OVERDUE_CNT, (SELECT MAX(N.RCPT_DT) FROM NOTIFICATION N WHERE N.RCVR_USER_ID = B.USER_ID) AS LAST_NOTICE_DT FROM TUITION_BILL B JOIN MEMBER M ON B.USER_ID = M.USER_ID
GROUP BY B.USER_ID, M.USER_NAME
ORDER BY OVERDUE_CNT DESC, UNPAID_AMT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{screenSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TUITION_PAYMENT WHERE EXT_PAY_ID = #{extPayId}
SELECT PAY_SN FROM TUITION_PAYMENT WHERE EXT_PAY_ID = #{extPayId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TUITION_BILL SET BILL_STAT_CD = '03', PAY_SN = #{paySn}, MDFCN_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE BILL_SN = ( SELECT BILL_SN FROM ( SELECT BILL_SN FROM TUITION_BILL WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND TRIM(BILL_STAT_CD) IN ('01', '02') AND BILL_AMT = #{amount} ORDER BY DUE_DT ASC, BILL_SN ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 )
